positional_bias.note: Re-derived = index per MCQ from quiz.gift; matches meta correct_position_distribution exactly.

length_bias.note: Measured char length of every option with #feedback stripped. No correct (=) option exceeds 1.20x the per-question distractor mean. Matches meta claim of 0/6.

distractor_plausibility.note: Every ~ is a genuine beginner misconception grounded in adjacent corpus concepts (ordinary testing vs adversarial, backup copies, inspector-only, performance/usability/hardware confusions, pillar replacement). No score-1 absurd distractors.

objective_coverage.note: All 5 corpus §3 LOs tested. 6 MCQ, standard profile, include_short_answer=false (no short-answer expected). No orphan objective_refs.

beginner_fairness_scope.note: Plain-language stems; AI spelled out in q1. Tests red-teaming only. q4 categories (jailbreaks, harmful outputs, data leakage, data poisoning, hallucination/bias) all taught in corpus §5.5. Prompt injection (5.6) and governance/NIST detail are NOT required to answer any item; prompt injection appears only as a deferred mention in the corpus. No scope creep.

gift_validity.note: Clean ::id:: stem { ... } blocks; $CATEGORY present. Each MCQ has exactly one = plus three ~, each carrying well-formed #feedback, plus a #### general-feedback line. No unescaped # in any stem.

verdict: Pass — positional bias 0.33, length-bias 0/6, no absurd distractors, all 5 LOs covered, beginner-fair and on-headline, GIFT valid.
